question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not mention or list any chapters of the thesis. It focuses entirely on describing the problem statement and the proposed solution.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the contents of thesis sections; instead, it describes the problem context and the scope of the proposed prototype.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is not visible in this text. While the problem is well-defined, the text lacks a roadmap of how the research or development will be presented (e.g., literature review, methodology, implementation, results).
